styleProfile.summary: Analyzed 51 ARV reference thumbnails: predominantly dark, high-contrast, dominant compositions dark-background, center-heavy, title-band. Average brightness 0.21, contrast 0.82. Recurring motifs: signal / transmission.
typographyNotes: clean lower third reserved for footer
negativeStyleRules: no readable AI-generated text in the background
no celebrity likeness or copyrighted characters

foundryIqMemory.query: Welche kuratierten ARV-Style-Regeln, Paletten und Titelmuster gelten fuer ein YouTube-Livestream-Thumbnail von Audioreworkvisions / Techno Transmissions? Welche Negative Rules und verbotenen Stilbrueche muessen fuer ein Techno-Thumbnail beachtet werden? Welche Prompt-DNA-Fragmente und Layout-Muster passen zu einem 16:9 Techno-Thumbnail mit lokal gerendertem Titeltext?
styleRules: ARV Thumbnail Studio: Use dark, high-contrast compositions with dominant center subject and clean title bands.
Employ analog textures: damaged photocopy, wet toner grain, CRT scanlines, paper fibers.
Keep one dominant visual mechanism (signal, transmission, central figure or silhouette).
Palette: Select from red, black, deep-blue, amber, grey, magenta, off-white, green. Avoid over-bright bloom; maintain average brightness ~0.21, high contrast ~0.82.
patterns: Center-heavy layout with clear main subject and typographic overlay.
One key light mechanism (scanner band, amber window, cyan portal, red/cyan halo).
Background: dark and uncluttered, textured but not chaotic.

Use reference prompt fragments: 'A black electro-boogie silhouette appears like a damaged photocopy on black paper', 'hooded transmission monk in front of red-cyan signal halo', 'central silhouette inside tall vertical amber window'.
dramaturgy: Reveal a subject through scanlines, rings, or Xerox duplication.
Edges invent ghosts/halos/copy errors; center remains crisp.
Narrative frame: Signal finds lock, one ritual action, payoff freeze.
Treat title or overlay as a local broadcast signal, not corporate branding.
continuity: Do not copy old thumbnails; introduce at least one new visual idea.
Repeat palette or texture anchors, remix motifs (signal, frequency, archive, visual ritual).
Strict subject silhouette readability: One event, loop grammar, clear payoff pose.
Keep the thumbnail compatible as a livestream/OBS visual.
forbidden: No strobe lights, rapid blinking, or violent flicker.
No hectic pacing, crowded club crowd, full dance choreography, frantic glitch spam.
No generic corporate motion graphics, sterile stock-video realism, over-clean 3D polish, glossy ad polish, neon cyberpunk city.
No crowded backgrounds, unreadable text clutter, watermark artifacts, large fake logos.

citations.excerpt: Absolute Avoid: no strobe lights, rapid blinking, harsh flashing, hectic pacing, very fast rotating objects, full dance choreography, crowded club crowd, random chaotic glitch spam, violent flicker. Style Avoid: generic corporate motion graphics, sterile stock-video realism, over-clean 3D polish, bland photoreal cinematics, glossy ad polish, neon cyberpunk city, washed-out beige palette, cute-only children’s illustration when ARV darkness is required.

Audioreworkvisions / Hyroglyphs is an audiovisual techno world ... not generic AI fantasy, glossy cyberpunk, corporate motion graphics, or stock-video sci-fi ... Hypnotic nocturne loop language. Dark or uncluttered space as the default stage. One dominant visual mechanism per scene. Controlled, loop-clear motion. Analog texture. Techno as frequency, ritual, archive, signal ... PEACE LOVE TECHNO.

ARV Prompt DNA Fragments ... A black electro-boogie silhouette ... damaged photocopy on black paper ... hooded transmission monk ... central silhouette in vertical amber window ... wet Xerox paper, toner dust ... magenta chromatic copies ... cyan scanner light ... Negative prompt: avoid prominent text overlays, obvious logos, watermark artifacts, aggressive flashing, glossy ad polish, frantic glitch spam.

Primary Palette Families: Nocturne Signal - velvet black, midnight indigo, deep cobalt, cyan halo, magenta edge bleed, low red signal glow, chalk white. Amber Xerox Ritual - black paper void, sunburnt amber, wet toner black, cyan scanner band, magenta chromatic copy ... Dark Sci-Fi Transmission - black, cyan rim light, emergency red, dim teal, smoky grey, dirty white typography.

A HeroGlyphs story should ... describe a transformation mechanism ... reveal through scanlines, rings, Xerox duplication ... signal finds lock ... payoff freeze ... The center holds truth; the edges invent ghosts ... Gesture becomes a warning signal.

concept.shortConcept: Hardgroove session — ANALOG COSMOS / HARDGROOVE SIGNAL RITUAL

titleVariants.title: COSMIC HARDGROOVE TRANSMISSION
titleVariants.subtitle: ANALOG SIGNALS FROM THE VOID
titleVariants.reason: Direct, broadcast-driven phrasing with cosmic scope and hardgroove intent.

titleVariants.title: ANALOG PULSE IN THE VOID
titleVariants.subtitle: HARDGROOVE MACHINE RITUAL
titleVariants.reason: Strong analog emphasis with hypnotic pulse language.

titleVariants.title: SUBTERRANEAN COSMIC RHYTHM
titleVariants.subtitle: RAW HARDGROOVE BROADCAST
titleVariants.reason: Underground framing with cosmic scale and raw groove.

titleVariants.title: HARDGROOVE SIGNAL RITUAL
titleVariants.subtitle: COSMIC ANALOG TRANSMISSION
titleVariants.reason: Ritualistic and transmission-focused, ideal ARV language.

titleVariants.title: FREQUENCY OF THE MACHINE VOID
titleVariants.subtitle: COSMIC HARDGROOVE SYSTEMS
titleVariants.reason: Mechanical and abstract, fits dark broadcast aesthetics.

titleVariants.title: AFTER MIDNIGHT COSMIC GROOVE
titleVariants.subtitle: ANALOG HARDGROOVE SESSION
titleVariants.reason: Late-night transmission feel with groove-forward clarity.

titleVariants.title: VOID SIGNAL HARDGROOVE
titleVariants.subtitle: RAW ANALOG PULSE
titleVariants.reason: Minimal and aggressive, strong thumbnail readability.

titleVariants.title: ANALOG COSMOS RHYTHM CODE
titleVariants.subtitle: HARDGROOVE TRANSMISSIONS
titleVariants.reason: Abstract and coded, aligns with ARV signal language.

titleVariants.title: SIGNAL LOST IN COSMIC GROOVE
titleVariants.subtitle: HARDGROOVE SYSTEM FAILURE
titleVariants.reason: Narrative tension and system-failure motif fits ARV perfectly.

concept.description: Raw Hardgroove Techno with a cosmic analog edge. Xerox-worn textures, dark signal rituals and machine-driven rhythm collide in a deep broadcast from the void. Audioreworkvisions transmits another underground session where body, signal and system lock into resistance. PEACE LOVE TECHNO
concept.layout: Final composed thumbnail; centered brutal typography over a dark analog background, topline TECHNO TRANSMISSIONS above, PEACE LOVE TECHNO footer, center-heavy.
concept.backgroundPrompt:
Hardgroove broadcast scene, cosmic, analog mood, theme: ANALOG COSMOS / HARDGROOVE SIGNAL RITUAL. Visual motifs: waveform/signal background, xerox grain, scanlines, analog broadcast residue. Foundry IQ patterns: Center-heavy layout with clear main subject and typographic overlay.; One key light mechanism (scanner band, amber window, cyan portal, red/cyan halo).; Background: dark and uncluttered, textured but not chaotic..
- 16:9 YouTube thumbnail background
- no readable text
- leave clear space for title overlay
- dark analog techno transmission aesthetic
- damaged photocopy / black paper texture
- cyan / amber / magenta accents
- high contrast
- readable composition
- no logos
- no watermark
- no celebrity likeness
- no copyrighted characters
- no generated words
concept.negativePrompt: readable text, letters, words, typography, logos, watermark, signature, celebrity likeness, copyrighted characters, glossy EDM festival wallpaper, cute mascots, low contrast mush, blurry, no strobe lights, rapid blinking, or violent flicker., no hectic pacing, crowded club crowd, full dance choreography, frantic glitch spam., no generic corporate motion graphics, sterile stock-video realism, over-clean 3d polish, glossy ad polish, neon cyberpunk city., no crowded backgrounds, unreadable text clutter, watermark artifacts, large fake logos., no readable ai-generated text in the background, no logos or watermarks, no celebrity likeness or copyrighted characters, no glossy edm festival wallpaper

textOverlay.subtitle: ANALOG SIGNALS FROM THE VOID
textOverlay.colorLogic: thin spaced uppercase off-white with blue/amber glow

creativeDecision.whyTitle: "COSMIC HARDGROOVE TRANSMISSION" was selected because it is short, uppercase and built from the ARV word field, matching Audioreworkvisions / Techno Transmissions tone without generic EDM language.
creativeDecision.whyTheme: Theme "ANALOG COSMOS / HARDGROOVE SIGNAL RITUAL" fits the Hardgroove vibe and the cosmic/analog mood.
creativeDecision.whyLayout: Layout: Final composed thumbnail; centered brutal typography over a dark analog background, topline TECHNO TRANSMISSIONS above, PEACE LOVE TECHNO footer, center-heavy.
creativeDecision.whyPalette: Palette red, black, deep-blue, amber, grey, magenta was derived from the analyzed ARV reference profile and Foundry IQ palette guidance.
creativeDecision.whyLocalText: The exact title is rendered locally via Sharp + SVG because AI image generators frequently misspell text; the background only provides scene and posterspace.
